pages.title: Ribbit
pages.text: Frog-folk. Small and lean. Eats only bugs, fish, and slime. Coils when grounded, launches when released.

pages.title: Traits
pages.text: $(bold)Spring Leap.$(/) Hold the Origins primary key while standing on the ground to coil; release for a leap up to roughly six blocks. Normal jumps are unaffected.$(br2)$(bold)Soft Landing.$(/) Falls do nothing. Any height.$(br2)$(bold)Grung Hide.$(/) Immune to poison.$(br2)$(bold)Webbed Feet.$(/) Swim speed +25%, hold breath longer than the others. Not true water-breathing.

pages.title: Drawbacks
pages.text: $(bold)Insectivore.$(/) Only fish, slimeballs, spider eyes, and the pack's bug foods give nutrition. Everything else does nothing.$(br2)$(bold)Cold-Blooded.$(/) Movement reduced 25% in cold biomes.
